ddls:
CREATE TABLE "chemical_compounds" (
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compound */,
  "molecular_formula" TEXT /* Molecular formula of the compound */,
  "chain_length" INTEGER /* Length of the carbon chain in the compound */,
  "cl_number" INTEGER /* Chlorine number in the compound */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of sample (e.g., Blank) */,
  "retention_time" REAL /* Retention time for the compound in experiments */,
  "procedure_blank" REAL /* Procedure blank measurement for the compound */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the compound */,
  "boiling_point" REAL /* Boiling point of the compound */,
  "melting_point" REAL /* Melting point of the compound */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the compound */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the compound being tested */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was conducted */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the experiment in textual format */,
  "procedure_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the laboratory procedure used */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher conducting the experiment */,
  "lab_technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lab technician assisting the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_procedure_id FOREIGN KEY ("procedure_id") REFERENCES procedures ("procedure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES chemical_compounds ("compound_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_lab_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_technician_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "procedures" (
  "procedure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each procedure */,
  "procedure_name" TEXT /* Name of the laboratory procedure */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the procedure */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Standard operating protocol for the procedure */,
  "equipment_required" TEXT /* List of equipment required for the procedure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("procedure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, lab technician, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "research_group" TEXT /* Research group the user is part of */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES departments ("department_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_research_group FOREIGN KEY ("research_group") REFERENCES research_groups ("group_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound accessed */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES chemical_compounds ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compound_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound being analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "analysis_results" TEXT /* Results of the analysis in textual format */,
  "instrument_used" TEXT /* Instrument used for the analysis */,
  "technique_used" TEXT /* Technique used for the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compound_analysis_instrument_used FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_used") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compound_analysis_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES chemical_compounds ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "retention_studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each retention study */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound being studied */,
  "study_date" TEXT /* Date of the study */,
  "study_results" TEXT /* Results of the retention study in textual format */,
  "study_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the study was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retention_studies_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES chemical_compounds ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the research group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research group */,
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group leader */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_groups_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("leader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_calibration" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration event */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being calibrated */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the calibration */,
  "calibration_results" TEXT /* Results of the calibration in textual format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_calibration_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compound_samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound the sample belongs to */,
  "sample_date" TEXT /* Date the sample was created */,
  "sample_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the sample was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compound_samples_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES chemical_compounds ("compound_id")
)
